title: Adok
body:
# Adok Tram
> This vehicle is only suitable for version 4.0.0+

> This Tram Is Inspired From Adok S From Tram Simulator Urban Transit

> It's a Siemens S700 Reskin

# Including

> Dark Interior and Exterior

> White Armchairs with Black Stripes

>Changed Headlights and Andlights

# This Pack Works only in MTR4+
